name: 2pk Votive Candle Gift Set Rainwater Lily Charcoal and Black Teak - Threshold™
description:
Create a serene atmosphere with the 2pk Votive Candle Gift Set Rainwater Lily Charcoal and Black Teak from Threshold™. This luxurious set includes two 4.5-ounce votive candles, each housed in a sleek glass container and crafted with palm wax blended with essential oils. The fragrance pairing of rainwater lily and charcoal black teak blends fresh floral notes with earthy depth, perfect for setting a calm, elevated mood. Each candle features a single wick and provides up to 20 hours of burn time, making this set an ideal gift for your loved ones.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you™
